title: Orcana Skill Manifest — Machine-Readable Template
description: This JSON Schema defines the structure for both manifest.json (per-skill) and ai-manifest.json (the template itself). Orcana Runtime reads this to validate new skills before loading them.

name.description: Kebab-case identifier. Must match the directory name.

version.description: Semantic version. Increment major on protocol changes, minor on new features, patch on fixes.

description.description: One-line description of what this skill does.

lifecycle.description: Current lifecycle state. New skills MUST start as 'candidate'.

tier.description: Skill complexity tier. Determines which files are required.

triggers.description: Keywords that activate this skill. At least 3, preferably 5+.

useWhen.description: Specific scenarios where this skill should activate.

doNotUseWhen.description: Specific scenarios where this skill should NOT activate. Must have at least 2.

allowedTools.description: Whitelist of tool names this skill can access. NEVER include '*' or leave empty.

requiredEvidence.description: Evidence fields that must be present in the skill's output.

riskLevel.description: Blast radius if the skill produces incorrect output.

requiresReview.description: Whether output must pass independent review before delivery.

referenceRouting.description: Map of user intent descriptions to arrays of reference file paths.

dependencies.description: npm packages required by this skill.

peerSkills.description: Related skills and their relationship to this one.
